title: Fix: normalize undefined input for all optional object schemas in validation (#10031)

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): normalize undefined/null input for tools with optional parameters
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: supersedes — fixes the same issue #10031 with a similar approach, merged 10 days after this PR was opened

relatedIssues.title: [BUG] Tool validation fails with "root: Required" when LLM sends undefined for all-optional parameters

summary: Normalizes undefined tool input to {} for Zod object schemas where all fields are optional, preventing 'root: Required' validation errors when LLMs (e.g., Claude Sonnet) send undefined instead of an empty object. Adds a test case and changeset. The PR is well-structured with a clear description, test coverage, and proper changeset.
maintainerNotes: This PR is fully superseded by #10728, which was merged on 2025-12-01 and fixes the exact same issue (#10031) with the same approach (normalizing undefined/null input for tools with optional parameters). The fix from #10728 is already in the codebase (commit bff114556b). This PR also has merge conflicts and stale CI (tests stuck in PENDING for 474+ days). Should be closed with a thank-you to the contributor for their effort.
